zh.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.Cloister Mary,Salisbury, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Frowick於1380年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Henry Frowyk36歲，母親Alice Cornwall27歲。他於1420年之後與Isabel Oliver結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1435年在英國米德萊可倫敦被列為lord mayor of london。他去世於1458年3月8日之前在英國倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.Cloister Mary,Salisbury, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Frowick于1380年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Henry Frowyk36岁，母亲Alice Cornwall27岁。他于1420年之后与Isabel Oliver结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1435年在英国米德萊可倫敦被列为lord mayor of london。他去世于1458年3月8日之前在英国倫敦，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Frowick was born in 1380, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Henry Frowyk, was 36 and his mother, Alice Cornwall, was 27. He married Isabel Oliver after 1420. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1435, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as lord mayor of london in London, Middlesex, England. He died before 8 March 1458, in London, England, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Frowick est né en 1380, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Frowyk, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Cornwall, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Oliver après 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1435, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord mayor of london à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 8 mars 1458, à Londres, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Frowick 1380 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Frowyk 36 und seine Mutter Alice Cornwall 27. Er hat nach 1420 Isabel Oliver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1435, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord mayor of london in London, Middlesex, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 8. März 1458 in London, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Frowick è nato il nel 1380 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Henry Frowyk, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice Cornwall, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Oliver dopo il 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1435, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord mayor of london nel London, Middlesex, England. Morì prima del 8 marzo 1458, nel London, England, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Middlesex, kingdom of England: イギリスミッドレセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Frowickが1380年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Henry Frowykは36歳，母Alice Cornwallは27歳であった。1420年以後にIsabel Oliverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1435年，55歳の時，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでの職業はlord mayor of londonと記録されている。彼は1458年3月8日以前にイギリスロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Frowick(이)가 1380년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Frowyk(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Cornwall(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1420년 이후 Isabel Oliver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1435년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 lord mayor of london이었다. 그는 1458년 3월 8일 이전 영국 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Frowick nasceu em 1380, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Frowyk, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice Cornwall, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Oliver após 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1435, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord mayor of london em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 8 de março de 1458, em London, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Frowick родился в 1380 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Frowyk было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Cornwall, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Oliver после 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1435 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии lord mayor of london в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. Он умер перед 8 марта 1458 г. в местности Лондон, Англия и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.c1400-1460: mai le e tusa o le 1400 e o'o I le 1460

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Frowick nació en 1380, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Frowyk, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice Cornwall, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Isabel Oliver después de 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1435, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era lord mayor of london en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 8 de marzo de 1458, en London, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
